Parameter.name: fadeProgress
Parameter.description: X - FadeIN: start=-1.0 end=1.0 / Y - FadeOUT: start=1.0 end=-1.0

Parameter.name: fadeScale
Parameter.description: Scale vertices by normals while fading

Parameter.name: shapeScaleSpread
Parameter.description: X - shape width scaler / Y - shape height scaler / Z - spread at end

Parameter.name: controlPoint
Parameter.description: X - distance to control point / Y - bending in radians
